nasb.text: You have journeyed to the king with oil And increased your perfumes; You have sent your envoys a great distance And made them go down to Sheol.

esv.text: You journeyed to the king with oil and multiplied your perfumes; you sent your envoys far off, and sent down even to Sheol.

cnv.text: 你帶著油走到君王那裡， 並且加多了你的香料， 差派使者到遠方去， 你甚至自己下到陰間去！

ccb.text: 你们带着橄榄油和许多香料去拜假神， 差遣使者到远方， 甚至去阴间寻找神明。

csbs.text: 你带着油，朝觐摩洛， 多添你的香料； 你也派遣使者们到远方， 甚至派遣他们下到阴间去。
